overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character walking through ornate gothic corridors and entering a circular classroom with vaulted ceilings. The scene features warm artificial lighting from chandeliers and wall sconces, with students seated at desks in the classroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate gothic corridor with portrait paintings

gold-framed painting of a robed figure on the teal wall
ornate hanging light fixture illuminating the corridor
dark teal painted walls with wooden trim and decorative moldings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, ornate gothic corridor with teal walls and wooden paneling. Ornate pillars and gold-framed portraits line the walls, illuminated by warm chandelier light. The corridor is empty of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition through doorway into circular classroom

events.description: character opens large wooden door and enters the circular classroom from the corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening the large wooden door, stepping into the circular classroom

notable_agents.action: students sitting at wooden desks facing the center of the classroom

entered.detail: large circular room with vaulted ceiling and chalkboards on the walls
high gothic ceiling with stone arches and ribbed vaulting
large blackboard with circular geometric diagrams drawn in white chalk
blackboard with complex geometric patterns and symbols

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large wooden door at the end of the corridor and enters a spacious circular classroom. The room features a high vaulted ceiling, wall sconces, and chalkboards with diagrams. Students are seated at desks arranged in a circle.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arithmancy classroom with circular seating arrangement

agents.ego_description: standing at the back of the classroom observing the students and the room interior

notable_agents.action: students sitting at wooden desks arranged in a circle, facing inward toward the center

entered.detail: circular fire pit or brazier in the center of the classroom floor
multiple wooden desks arranged in a circular pattern around the room

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static position at the back of the circular Arithmancy classroom, showing students seated at wooden desks arranged around a central fire pit. The room is illuminated by wall sconces and features chalkboards with geometric diagrams on the walls beneath a high vaulted ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded gothic hallway into a bustling, circular academic chamber. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor characterized by teal walls, wooden paneling, and gold-framed portraits illuminated by the warm glow of chandeliers. As the camera reaches the end of the passage, it passes through a large wooden door, causing the space to expand abruptly into a spacious classroom with high vaulted ceilings and chalkboards covered in diagrams. The scene then shifts to a static perspective from the back of the room, revealing students seated at wooden desks arranged in a circle around a central fire pit. Finally, the view settles on the Arithmancy classroom, where wall sconces cast a soft light over the geometric studies and the gathered students.
